title: Pelagic soft curation: legacy shard size metadata normalised
body: Thread: agentic-engineering-enhancements. Soft pending-graduations legacy shard slice complete: in .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-06-to-2026-05-21-legacy-backlog.md, the E-1/E-2 exploration candidate metadata now uses closed-vocabulary size L instead of the invalid M-to-L combined value. The combined-work uncertainty is preserved explicitly as route-state prose, and the plan plus napkin were updated. Targeted markdownlint, git diff --check, fitness informational, fitness strict-hard, and collaboration-state check all passed; closing claim next.
